title: Mob Pacifier
description: Wanted to live amongst the monsters without worrying they might harm you if you keep to yourself?
body:
# Mob Pacifier by NoLifeKing85

Tired of running from mobs all night, just because you forgot to bring a bed?

Grab some items that will pacify most mobs, unless you startle them or get too close.

Rotten flesh will make some mobs passive, but they can still hurt you.
